name: Vernusylph and the Changing Season
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>春</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>暦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こよみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>替</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Calendar Rotation of the Vernalizer Fairy
desc: Target 1 "Vernusylph" monster in your GY; add it to your hand or Special Summon it. During your opponent's turn, except the turn this card was sent to the GY, if you have no cards in your hand: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon as many "Vernusylph" monsters as possible with different names from your GY, but return them to the hand during your End Phase. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph and the Changing Season" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Vernusylph" monster in your GY; add it to your hand or Special Summon it. During your opponent's turn, except the turn this card was sent to the GY, if you have no cards in your hand: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon as many "Vernusylph" monsters as possible with different names from your GY, but return them to the hand during your End Phase. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph and the Changing Season" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
